top_findings.title: Date range filter missing — only season filter implemented
top_findings.evidence: main.go:55 matches_by_team tool accepts season and competition but no start_date/end_date params; query.go:83 has MatchesBySeason but no date range function
top_findings.suggestion: Add date range parameters (start_date, end_date) to matches_by_team tool and implement DateRange filtering in query.go
